reference: I started out with what I thought was a canker sore, but after putting powdered elm on it, I realized there was another one inside at the bottom of my teeth (the floor of my inside teeth). My gums are red and I see a few white patches on them. Would this be oral cancer? I have been using peroxide to kill what is in there.
text: It started out with what I thought was a canker sore, but after putting powdered elm on it, I realized there was another one inside at the bottom of my teeth, the floor of my inside teeth. My gums are red and I see a few white patches on them. Could this be oral cancer? I have been using peroxide to kill what is in there.
